Description: A large shopping mall located in Shenzhen, China. The building footprint is approximately 91.7 m (east-west) by 50.9 m (north-south), rectangular, with the long axis rotated 75 degrees from north. Total gross floor area is about 14000.0 m^2 spread over 3 floor(s), giving roughly 4666.7 m^2 per floor. Floor-to-floor height is 5.2 m. The building is divided into 24 thermal zones in total (about 8 per floor). Typical space layout: per floor: anchor shops + mid-mall retail + atrium + dining terrace + restrooms. Window-to-wall ratio is approximately 40% on exterior walls, with windows distributed on all four facades. Model all zones with appropriate constructions, glazing, occupancy, lighting, equipment and HVAC (ideal loads) so the IDF runs in EnergyPlus without errors.
